differentialBuckets.label: Thyrotoxicosis: diagnostic frame from guideline-sourced endocrine workup

source.source_section: Thyrotoxicosis generated endocrine workup: diagnostic frame
source.implementation_notes: Generated from endocrine workup automation; requires clinician sign-off before validated-intent activation.

differentialBuckets.label: Key thresholds and interpretation caveats: TSH typical adult range about 0.4-4.0 mIU/L; use local lab, pregnancy, and illness context. Free T4 typical adult range about 0.8-1.8 ng/dL; use local assay.

differentialBuckets.action: Use local assay and patient context; do not apply numeric anchors without clinical interpretation.

redFlags.label: Storm physiology, AF, heart failure, severe weight loss, altered mental status.

redFlags.action: Escalate urgently, reassess severity, and evaluate for dangerous mimics or complications.

initialTests.label: TSH, free T4, T3.

source.source_section: Thyrotoxicosis generated endocrine workup: diagnostic workup
source.implementation_notes: Generated from endocrine workup automation; requires clinician sign-off before validated-intent activation.

initialTests.action: Interpret with local lab ranges. Reference anchors: TSH typical adult range about 0.4-4.0 mIU/L; use local lab, pregnancy, and illness context. Free T4 typical adult range about 0.8-1.8 ng/dL; use local assay. T3, TRAb/TSI, TPO Ab, and thyroglobulin Ab are assay-specific.

initialTests.label: TRAb/TSI.

initialTests.label: RAIU: high uptake suggests overproduction; low uptake suggests thyroiditis/exogenous/iodine-related in many cases.
